steps.title: Name what fragmentation does
steps.content: The sentence says forest fragmentation inevitably causes changes to local ecological processes, and those changes affect specialist caterpillars more than generalist species. The blank needs a word meaning produces or gives rise to.

steps.title: Reject opposite verbs
steps.content: Choice B means weakens, Choice C means prevents by acting first, and Choice D means includes or absorbs. None fits a sentence about fragmentation producing ecological alterations. The answer is A.
